raw_responses.title: Pangu Pro MoE: Mixture of Grouped Experts (MoGE, 2025/05)
raw_responses.snippet: LLM-side: MoGE groups experts during selection; constrains tokens to activate equal number of experts within each predefined expert group; balanced workload.

raw_responses.title: Mixture of Heterogeneous Grouped Experts (MoHGE, 2026/04)
raw_responses.snippet: LLM-side: two-level routing for capacity matching; All-size Group-decoupling Allocation.

raw_responses.title: Upcycling LLMs into MoE (arxiv 2024/10)
raw_responses.snippet: LLM-side: weight permutation reinitializes FFN before copying into experts; permutation operator over FFN copies.

raw_responses.snippet: LLM-side: weight ensembling across experts for multi-task merging; shared structure across experts.
